name: methodic
description: Methodic platform plugins for Claude Code — skills + (eventually) MCP server for working with Chronicle experiments.

plugins.name: methodic
plugins.description: Skills that help your agent track research hypotheses and experimental results on the Chronicle platform, with role-filtered search over past experimental results and uploaded research documents — research surveys, hypothesis-driven experiment + variation generation, history/lineage search, prep/fork variations, dataset upload, report write-ups, cross-variation distillation, lifecycle (delete open drafts, retract committed work, purge orphaned assets, move into an org), status.
